太祖从草根崛起，陈桥驿皇袍加身，是夺得柴氏天下，还是取回本该属于他的帝国。
刀光斧影，是兄终弟继引发的惨案，还是另有隐情。
长子疯，次子暴毙，皇位终落真宗头上。澶渊之盟，城下之耻，靠着泰山封禅，到底有没有化解统治危机。
歌女一步步走上权力颠峰，刘娥与李妃的一段恩仇，垂帘听政，功过可如何评说。
更有庆历新政，安石变法，大宋帝国，如何革故鼎新，一代代雄主，智士又如何破局。
靖康耻，崖山战，三百年的和与战，看大宋风云，重拾那一段激情的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe8b0201948ac8124eb09399a76ac5bae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"凌风独行","author_id":"","book_id":"7355365469861202968","book_name":"大宋风云十八帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7355365592687198744","read_count":"485","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1085185"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"516","tags":"历史古代,历史,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9804762cf6bc4134147381c9ee17f3c5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447213&x-signature=Oe5sfIBmAuJe8FL4MduZf1krRmw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"54991538968","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"116"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185333C19BD53DDAF64A4A7675"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":30731,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54583,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":978},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1715993941,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7365688656495772440","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不
